headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .179 / .233 / .286.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 5, PHI 2. Luinder Avila led the night, working 5.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Luinder Avila
player_of_game.reason: worked 5.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk.
